title: crotalaria ankaratrana
intro: Crotalaria ankaratrana, also known as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a plant native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria ankaratrana include the potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antivenom. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria ankaratrana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots to create a tincture.
